# Farm E-commerce Application Setup

## Project Overview
Farm E-commerce Catalog Application - Node.js and Express-based web application for farm product sales with catalog browsing, product details, shopping cart, and containerized deployment.

## Key Features
- Product catalog with categories (sayuran, padi-padian, umbi-umbian, buah-buahan, bumbu-dapur)
- Product detail pages
- Shopping cart functionality
- Bottom navigation menu (home, catalog, cart, about, profile)
- Docker containerization

## Development Guidelines
- Use Express.js for the backend
- Use EJS for templating
- Keep product data in memory (can be migrated to database later)
- Ensure responsive design for mobile and desktop
- Follow RESTful API conventions
